strengths: Nearly 20 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-scale distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), comfortably exceeding the 15-year requirement
Current hands-on AI builder fluency at re:cinq: AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly aligned with the role's AI-powered product focus

Proven entrepreneurial and thought-leadership track record: founder of the open-source GISCollective platform (Kubernetes-deployed, adopted by Green Map), plus conference talks (FOSS4G) and multi-day workshops that demonstrate the ability to inspire and educate others
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, a stated preferred qualification
AI-specific experience is recent (2025 onward) and tooling-centric, without a long public record of recognized AI products or platforms
Prior titles cap at Staff/Senior engineer; director-level strategic scope and advising enterprise customers are not explicitly evidenced

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
20 years of broad, high-scale engineering experience
Founder experience and public technical evangelism
No advanced AI degree or long-standing recognized AI portfolio

response.justification: The candidate pairs two decades of full-stack and infrastructure engineering — including low-latency systems handling millions of requests per second and cloud deployment with Kubernetes and AWS CDK — with current, hands-on work building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, exactly the builder-level AI fluency this principal role demands. As a platform founder and an active speaker and workshop creator, they have demonstrated the entrepreneurial drive and ability to inspire technical audiences that the responsibilities call for. While they lack an advanced AI degree and formal director-level tenure, the breadth of engineering depth, live AI product work, and community leadership make a compelling case that they can identify and drive strategic AI differentiation.
